parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: false, error: 'Unauthorized', message: $json.error || 'Invalid webhook signature' }) }}

assignments.name: bookingTimeFormatted
assignments.value: ={{ $json.body.payload.startTime ? new Date($json.body.payload.startTime).toLocaleString('en-US', { weekday: 'short', month: 'short', day: 'numeric', hour: 'numeric', minute: '2-digit', timeZone: 'America/New_York' }) : 'TBD' }}

assignments.name: notionStatus
assignments.value: ={{ ((({"I'm interested in your security services": "prospect", "I'm a vendor or partner": "vendor_partner", "I'm a recruiter": "recruiter", "Something else": "other", "prospect": "prospect", "vendor_partner": "vendor_partner", "recruiter": "recruiter", "other": "other"})[($json.body.payload.responses && ($json.body.payload.responses.lead_type?.value || $json.body.payload.responses['Lead Type']?.value)) || ($json.body.payload.userFieldsResponses && $json.body.payload.userFieldsResponses.find(r => (r.label === 'Lead Type' || r.label === 'lead_type'))?.value)] || 'prospect') !== 'prospect') ? 'Disqualified' : ($json.body.triggerEvent === 'BOOKING_CANCELLED' ? 'Cancelled' : $json.body.triggerEvent === 'BOOKING_RESCHEDULED' ? 'Rescheduled' : 'Discovery Scheduled') }}

assignments.name: leadType
assignments.value: ={{ ({"I'm interested in your security services": "prospect", "I'm a vendor or partner": "vendor_partner", "I'm a recruiter": "recruiter", "Something else": "other", "prospect": "prospect", "vendor_partner": "vendor_partner", "recruiter": "recruiter", "other": "other"})[($json.body.payload.responses && ($json.body.payload.responses.lead_type?.value || $json.body.payload.responses['Lead Type']?.value)) || ($json.body.payload.userFieldsResponses && $json.body.payload.userFieldsResponses.find(r => (r.label === 'Lead Type' || r.label === 'lead_type'))?.value)] || 'prospect' }}

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ filter: { property: 'Contact Email', email: { equals: $json.bookerEmail } }, page_size: 1 }) }}
